name: Murch's Chandlery
description: A low-ceilinged shop that smells overwhelmingly of tallow and beeswax, its shelves crowded with candles of every size. Silas Murch keeps a stool behind the counter and a small fire going regardless of the hour.
atmosphericDetails: Dozens of candles in various states of completion hang from ceiling hooks on strings, swaying slightly.
The fire in the corner is banked low but hot — the room is stuffy despite the cold outside.
A ledger on the counter is open but turned face-down when anyone enters.
